description_long: This compact combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular body with a prominent forward-facing cannon mounted on a reinforced turret. The vehicle is equipped with wide, heavy-duty continuous tracks for enhanced mobility over rough terrain, and a large, cylindrical exhaust pipe extends from the rear right side. The exterior is primarily dark green with red accent panels and a distinctive orange insignia on each side, depicting a stylized skull and the number 8. The vehicle's armor appears thick and sloped, providing substantial protection to the front and sides. The overall design suggests a focus on durability, maneuverability, and urban combat effectiveness.
description: A compact, heavily-armored tracked combat vehicle with a large front cannon, dark green and red body, and orange insignia on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide tracks, thick frontal armor, and the large central cannon barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the orange insignia, side armor, and the exposed track and wheel system.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the cylindrical exhaust pipe, rear armor, and the full width of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the insignia and detailed track system visible.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mount at the front of the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, sloped panels covering the front, sides, and rear; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid color scheme with dark green as the primary color and red accent panels; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: Orange insignia with a stylized skull and the number 8 on both side panels.
